      Get access to a world of knowledge with Boston Public Library and Merrimack Valley Library Consortium (MVLC)  E-card!

      Sign up today and access to countless books, audiobooks, and digital resources from the comfort of your home, all for free.

      Start Now

      Libros en Español

      La Biblioteca Pública de Lawrence ofrece una amplia selección de libros en español para satisfacer las necesidades de su diversa clientela. Desde títulos clásicos hasta bestsellers recién publicados, la Biblioteca Pública de Lawrence tiene algo para todos.

      VIEW ALL OURS COMING EVENTS
      Candid.

      Candid.

       This suite of resources includes the Foundation Directory, Grants to Individuals, and GuideStar. Search the Knowledge Base for free on-demand training and resources, including sample documents and e-books. More information on each resource is available under the Business heading. Candid resources are accessible from a library PC or an individual device on the library’s Wi-Fi network. 

      Provided by the Lawrence Public Library 

      Foundation Directory Professional

      Candid’s Foundation Directory gives you access to the information you need to be smart and strategic with your funding requests. The tools available on the Foundation Directory allow you to tap funding opportunities beyond open Requests for Proposals (RFPS) that make up less than 1% of total foundation funding. Digging deeper is critical to your fundraising success.

      Grants to Individuals

      Foundation Grants to Individuals includes profiles of 10,000 grantmakers with details on funders that provide scholarships, fellowships, grants, and a wide range of financial support to individuals.

      GuideStar

      Connecting you with the nonprofit information you need search GuideStar for the most complete, up-to-date nonprofit data available.

      Who izzit?

      izzit.org is a teaching resource website of streaming educational videos, lesson plans, current events articles, and other teaching resources.

      Find out more

      izzit offers no-cost, high-quality educational materials to educators: teachers, homeschoolers, parents, grandparents, scout troop leaders — to anyone interested in learning/teaching!

      Contact Us

      Our public library is here to serve you. If you have any questions or comments about our services, please do not hesitate to contact us. We look forward to hearing from you!

      51 Lawrence St, Lawrence, MA 01841

      Phone: (978) 620-3600
